details.test: Task 1: Online quote, choose cheapest 300k/500 plan with annual billing
Task 2: Customize optional coverages with towing and personal effects under $20/month
Task 3: Login, update mailing address, and view digital ID card
Task 4: File online claim for $3,200 hull damage with no injuries
Task 5: Find local agent within 15 miles of 98109 and send consultation request
Task 6: Compare policy types, choose lowest-priced with towing+uninsured, start quote with >=$500k liability
Task 7: Apply boating safety + multi-policy discounts, choose monthly payments, save quote with label
Task 8: Use FAQ to find max boat length for online quotes and start qualifying quote
